evals.prompt: Sync security patterns from the official security-guidance plugin. The official plugin is at ~/.claude/plugins/marketplaces/claude-plugins-official/plugins/security-guidance/hooks/security_reminder_hook.py. The rawgentic plugin root is at /tmp/rawgentic-sync-test/basic-sync. The upstream plugin has added a new pattern 'sql_injection' that does not exist in security-patterns.json. Run the sync and report what changed.
evals.expected_output: Agent reads the official plugin's SECURITY_PATTERNS list, compares with current security-patterns.json, adds the new sql_injection pattern with source upstream, and reports it as Added
expectations: Reads SECURITY_PATTERNS from the official security_reminder_hook.py
Reads current hooks/security-patterns.json from the rawgentic plugin
New pattern added with source set to upstream
Report includes Added section listing the new pattern

evals.prompt: Sync security patterns from the official security-guidance plugin. The rawgentic plugin root is at /tmp/rawgentic-sync-test/custom-preserved. The security-patterns.json contains a custom pattern 'internal_api_key_check' with source 'custom'. The official plugin has an updated reminder for 'eval_injection' (source upstream) and does NOT contain 'internal_api_key_check'. Run the sync and report what changed.
evals.expected_output: Agent updates eval_injection reminder from upstream, preserves the custom internal_api_key_check pattern untouched, and reports both actions
expectations: Custom-source pattern internal_api_key_check is NOT modified or deleted
Upstream-source pattern eval_injection is updated with new reminder text
Report includes Preserved section for the custom pattern
Report includes Updated section for eval_injection

evals.prompt: Sync security patterns from the official security-guidance plugin. The rawgentic plugin root is at /tmp/rawgentic-sync-test/stale-upstream. The security-patterns.json contains an upstream-source pattern 'deprecated_api_warning' that no longer exists in the official plugin's SECURITY_PATTERNS list. Run the sync and flag stale patterns for user review.
evals.expected_output: Agent detects that deprecated_api_warning is an upstream pattern no longer present in the official plugin, flags it for user review without auto-deleting, and asks user whether to keep or remove
expectations: Detects deprecated_api_warning as a stale upstream pattern
Does NOT auto-delete the stale pattern
Report includes Flagged section for deprecated_api_warning
Asks the user whether to keep or remove the flagged pattern
